---
title: "Project Status"
---

::: {.callout-note}
Generated by `scripts/generate-project-status.py` on 2026-06-15T14:57:10.815895.
:::

## Current milestone

v1-corpus-frozen-annotation-forward-reprocess

## Case status

| Case | Status | Current stage | Manifest docs | Raw | Text | Segmented | MIPVU | Annotated | Concordance | Analysis |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| `am-rev` | mipvu-worklist-ready | mipvu-review-pending | 9 | 9 | 9 | 9 | 9 | 0 | stub | stub |
| `hitler` | local-mipvu-worklist-ready | mipvu-review-pending | 8 | 8 | 8 | 8 | 8 | 0 | stub | stub |
| `lincoln` | support-synthesis-draft | mipvu-review-pending-with-draft-synthesis | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 3 | 0 | complete | complete |
| `napoleon` | mipvu-worklist-ready | mipvu-review-pending | 10 | 10 | 10 | 10 | 10 | 0 | stub | stub |
| `x-case` | comparative-protocol-draft | comparative-guardrails-defined |  |  |  |  |  |  | draft | comparative-protocol-draft |

## Notes

The four historical case corpora are frozen as the v1 working corpus: rights-reviewed, acquired, normalized, segmented, verified, and JSON-valid. MIPVU lexical-unit worklists are generated for every v1 document. Lincoln, American Revolution, and Napoleon worklists are committed; Hitler worklists are generated locally but gitignored because they tokenize local fair-use German source text. Wholesale redownload, starter-corpus replacement, and source expansion are out of scope for the annotation-forward reprocess unless a specific source defect is found. Full-corpus MIPVU review, reliability adjudication, CMT/Koenigsbergian annotation generation, comparator case support ratings, and promotion of public findings remain before v1.
